title: asplenium pinnatifidum var. stotleri
intro: Asplenium pinnatifidum var. stotleri, also known as Stotler's spleenwort or Stotler's asplenium, is a rare, endemic fern species found in the southern Appalachian Mountains in the United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antibacterial agent. The health benefits of Asplenium pinnatifidum var. stotleri include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties which can aid in the treatment of conditions such as arthritis. Herbal preparations of Asplenium pinnatifidum var. stotleri often involve infusions of the plant's leaves, which can be made into teas or tinctures for medicinal use.
